rationale: Evaluates if 90%+ down-volume days followed by a higher open mark definitive tradable crash bottoms.
expected_failure_mode: Bear markets often feature massive down-volume days followed by dead-cat bounces.
stop_conditions: near-Gold candidate repeats known Gold contract failures
quick grid has no candidate worth full certification
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Holding periods generated by the signal produce drawdowns exceeding 20%.
Signal frequency is less than 1 per year, making it statistically weak.
